Gautam Gambhir Backs Harshit Rana as Top Bowling All-Rounder

Dec 8, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Gautam Gambhir Backs Harshit Rana as Key All-Rounder

Gautam Gambhir has expressed strong backing for pacer Harshit Rana, citing his batting skills and potential as a bowling all-rounder.
